product.name: Beast AI / BeastBrain
product.description: AI-powered content creation and productivity assistant selling small digital AI credits and subscriptions.

compliance_notes: Use the individual route only under Shajahan's own verified name unless the provider approves a business profile.
Do not represent an individual account as SICHER MAYOR INVESTMENTS L.L.C unless the provider approves that legal entity on the account.
Provider-hosted checkout/payment links must handle card data; BeastBrain must not store raw card number, expiry, or CVV.
